# BP-9 negative variant: strings/comments that resemble select are not code
lang: go
file: BP-9-variant-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "time"

func wait(ch <-chan struct{}) {
	// select { case <-ch: } is documentation, not a blocking select.
	_ = "select { case <-ch: }"
	select {
	case <-ch:
		_ = "{"
	case <-time.After(time.Second):
	}
}
